topic: Production agent runtime observability is becoming the real bottleneck
selection_reason: This topic connects agentic coding to real engineering operations: tracing, human review, and failure recovery.

sources.title: Runtime behind production deep agents
sources.raw_summary: Production agents need runtime support beyond prompts.

article_markdown:
## TL;DR
- Agent 的難點正在從寫 prompt 轉向可觀測、可恢復、可審核。

## 我的判斷
我會把這件事看成 agent 產品化的基礎工程問題，而不是單純模型能力問題。

## 限制與風險
如果沒有 trace 與人工審核，agent 很容易把錯誤藏在多步流程裡。

issues.problem: Article should add one more primary source before publishing.
issues.suggested_fix: Add official framework docs or release notes.

claim_source_table.claim: Production agents need runtime support beyond prompts.
claim_source_table.note: Use as supporting evidence, not the only source.

distribution.newsletter: 本期觀察 agent runtime、可觀測性與人類審核如何影響 production readiness。

seo.title: Agent 產品化真正困難的地方：Runtime、Trace 與人工審核
seo.description: 從工程流程角度看 agent runtime、可觀測性與 human-in-the-loop 為什麼重要。
